# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    default: '[resourceGroup().location]'
  osType:
    type: string
    default: windows
    allowedValues: ['windows', 'linux']
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: User name for the Virtual Machine.
  authenticationType:
    type: string
    default: password
    allowedValues: ['password', 'sshPublicKey']
  adminPasswordOrSshKey:
    type: securestring
    default: P@ssw0rd1234

Resources:
  - name: ['[concat(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), \'-vm\')]']
    type: 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    location: !Sub ${location}
    properties:
      storageProfile:
        osDisk:
          createOption: fromImage
          caching: ReadWrite
      hardenedRunSpecConfiguration:
        enforceInstalledSvcRuntimeVersion: false
      provisioningState: Succeeded
      vmSize: Standard_D2s_v3
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaceConfigurations:
        - name: nic1
          properties:
            primary: true
            enableAcceleratedNetworking: true
            enableIPForwarding: false
            ipConfigurations:
            - name: ip1
              properties:
                subnet: 
                  id: '/subscriptions/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/myVnet/subnets/default'
                privateIPAddressVersion: 'IPv4'
                publicIPAddressConfiguration: 
                  name: PublicIpConfig1
                  properties: 
                    name: pip1
                    publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
      osProfile:
        adminUsername: !Sub ${adminUsername}
        computerNamePrefix: computernameprefix
        adminPassword: (if authenticationType eq 'password' ? adminPasswordOrSshKey : '')
        linuxConfiguration: {}
        secrets: []
